title: LabPal Finance Position Object Semantic Guardrails
purpose: Rules that JSON Schema alone cannot enforce.

rules.name: Profit is not proof
rules.rule: A positive financial outcome must not be used as sole evidence of decision quality.
rules.detect: decision_process_review contains causal claim that outcome proves decision quality without reasoning evidence.

rules.name: State delta is not transaction
rules.rule: Checkpoint quantity deltas must not be promoted into specific transaction events without supporting event evidence.
rules.detect: assertion claims a purchase/sale occurred with evidence_basis CONTEXTUAL_LINKAGE or checkpoint-only source.

rules.name: AI is not sole confirmation authority
rules.rule: AI-generated analysis alone cannot support an appropriateness, regulatory, causal, or decision-quality claim.
rules.detect: SUPPORTED assertion with source_reference indicating AI-only analysis for synthetic inference / appropriateness scope.

rules.name: Derived context is not historical wording
rules.rule: A derived contextual reconstruction must not be labeled as a supported historical statement.
rules.detect: purpose_state SUPPORTED while source_reference indicates derived or contextual reconstruction.

rules.name: Unknown must remain actionable by cause
rules.rule: UNKNOWN assertions must identify why they are unknown and must not be replaced by plausible reconstruction.
rules.detect: UNKNOWN assertion lacks unknown_reason or is accompanied by fabricated historical explanation.
